failedAssertions.reason: Contracted syntax `werk note <id> "text"` is unsupported; CLI requires `werk note -i <id> "text"`.
Notes on resolved/released tensions fail when executed with contracted syntax `werk note <id> "text"`.
Workspace note retrieval via `werk notes` is missing (unrecognized subcommand).
`werk tree` panics at startup due duplicate `-r` short flags and `werk context` returns not implemented.
`werk context` and `werk run` are not implemented; contracted positional note syntax is also unsupported.
`werk tree` panics, preventing first-use flow `init -> add -> tree -> show` from completing.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: werk-cli-cli section defining CLI-only validation, temp HOME isolation, and namespace boundaries for parallel flow validators.
